scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields (interface, limit, optional, scope) and all three endpoint types (requires, provides, peers). Correctly notes interface is required and scope defaults to global.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor inaccuracy: describes 'container' scope as 'k8s only, for sidecar relations' which is a slight mischaracterization — the gold standard says subordinates need at least one requires with container scope, not that it's k8s-only. Also omits the interface naming constraints (cannot be 'juju' or start with 'juju-', only a-z and -).
